title: microsoft/autogen
abstract: AutoGen is a framework for creating multi-agent AI applications that can act autonomously or work alongside humans. !CAUTION ⚠️ Maintenance Mode AutoGen is now in maintenance mode. It will not receive...
abstract_zh: AutoGen是个搞事情的框架，让你的小AI们既能独立作战，也能和人类和谐共处。现在它进入了“维修模式”，正在给自己打补丁呢！别担心，它还在顽强地坚守岗位，虽然可能有点小bug……不过放心，用起来依旧能给你带来满满的惊喜！
